name: hero-agency
description: A bold creative-agency hero: an oversized headline that overflows the grid, left-aligned, with a discreet meta rail (services, location, year) that breaks the symmetry. The audacity comes from scale and whitespace, not colour. Content reveals in a staggered upward motion and collapses to a plain fade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: Renders a single h1 for the headline and labels the section landmark via aria-labelledby
The kicker rule is decorative (aria-hidden) and does not affect contrast of the text
The CTA renders as a real link when given an href, otherwise as a button
The entrance animation respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider

intents: a creative agency or portfolio landing hero with a giant asymmetric headline
a bold typographic hero with a meta rail
examples: <HeroAgency eyebrow="Studio créatif — Est. 2016" title="On donne une voix aux marques qui osent" subtitle="Identité, produits numériques et motion pour les équipes ambitieuses." primaryAction={{ label: 'Voir les projets', href: '/work' }} />
